topic: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I will eat rice tomorrow. I will be eating food at 8 pm. I will have eaten food by 8 pm. I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm. She will go to work tomorrow.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: She will be working at 5 pm. She will have finished her work by 5 pm. She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm. They will go to school tomorrow. They will be playing at 3 pm.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "3 बजे तक वे homework कर चुके होंगे।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: They will have done their homework by 3 pm.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I will exercise tomorrow morning. I will be reading at 7 pm. I will have read this book by 7 pm. I will have been reading for three hours by 7 pm.
